SEARCH
Package com.lattice.metrics

Class StageMetrics

java.lang.Object
com.lattice.metrics.StageMetrics
All Implemented Interfaces:
WaitMetrics
public final class StageMetrics extends Object implements WaitMetrics
Live metrics for one stage worker.

Hot-path counters and histograms are graph-level opt-ins; histogram accessors return defensive copies. Runtime update methods such as recordConsume() are exposed for the runtime implementation and should not be called by applications.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    StageMetrics(String name)
    Creates metrics for a named stage.
    StageMetrics(String name, MetricsSpec metricsSpec)
    Creates metrics for a named stage.
